info.name: Camarin AI - Media Processing API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Camarin AI ImageInsight backend. Covers authentication (register/login/refresh/logout), user profile, and the job lifecycle (upload/list/details/retry).

Setup:
1. Set the `baseUrl` collection variable (defaults to http://localhost:8000/api/v1). For the deployed system, change it to your deployed API origin + /api/v1.
2. Run 'Login' first — the API sets HttpOnly accessToken/refreshToken cookies, and Postman stores them automatically. All subsequent authenticated requests will send them.
3. For 'Upload Image', select a real JPG/PNG/WEBP file in the form-data `image` field (max 5MB).

request.description: Create a new user account. Requires fullName (min 3 chars), a valid email, and a password (8-64 chars).
Authenticate. On success the API sets HttpOnly accessToken and refreshToken cookies; Postman stores them automatically for subsequent requests.
Rotates the access token using the refreshToken cookie. No request body — the refresh token is read from the HttpOnly cookie set at login.
Revokes all refresh tokens for the user and clears auth cookies. Requires a valid accessToken cookie.
Returns the currently authenticated user's profile. Requires a valid accessToken cookie.

formdata.description: A JPG, PNG, or WEBP file, max 5MB. File content is validated by magic bytes, not just extension.

request.description: Upload an image (multipart/form-data, field name 'image'). Creates a job with status 'pending', enqueues it for AI processing, and returns the jobId immediately (202). Requires auth.
Returns the authenticated user's jobs (newest first, paginated) plus aggregate stats (total, completed, processing, flagged). Each item includes a fresh signed image URL. Requires auth.

Returns the full result for a single job (caption, labels, labelDetails, detectedObjects, safeSearch, flagged status, metadata) plus a signed image URL. Set the {{jobId}} variable first. Requires auth.
Re-enqueues a FAILED job (returns 400 for any non-failed job). Set the {{jobId}} variable to a failed job's id. Requires auth.
